actionable_predicate: Before walking out of an active engineering commitment, name precisely what the team will lose and over what timeline. If the loss is real, role-bound, and un-pickup-able on the timeline you are giving — and the moment is already in motion — the exit needs a different shape (delayed start, transition runbook, paid contracting bridge).
roadmap_application: PM use: when an engineer gives notice mid-incident or mid-cutover, the PM has a structured conversation to have. Three specific questions: (a) is there material context that does not transfer in the notice period? (b) is the moment already in motion? (c) what alternate shape — bridge contract, delayed start — preserves the operator's freedom while honoring the duty's already-arrived-ness? The verse provides both the diagnostic and the alternative-shape framework.
verdict_reason: The implication is testable, the falsifiability scopes it tightly, and the counter_example handles the weaponised-un-replaceability case. PASS on both 7.3 and 3.11.
